traits.locale_text: ДРАФТ "Так у тебя есть опыт в таких случаях, Логикрат? Ты можешь спасти этого человека?"

languages.text: "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"
languages.original_text: ДРАФТ "Так у тебя есть опыт в таких случаях, Логикрат? Ты можешь спасти этого человека?"

traits.locale_text: DRAFT "So you have experience in such cases, Logicrat? Can you save this man?"
DRAFT "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"
DRAFT "So you have experience in such cases, Logicrat? Can you save this man?"
DRAFT "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"

languages.text: “伊奥贡，我知道你处理过类似情况。你救得了这个人吗？”
languages.original_text: "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡，我知道你处理过类似情况。你救得了这个人吗？”

languages.text: "Bildiğim kadarıyla bu tür vakalarda deneyimin var Eogunn. Bu adamı kurtarabilir misin?"
languages.original_text: "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"

traits.locale_text: "Bildiğim kadarıyla bu tür vakalarda deneyimin var Eogunn. Bu adamı kurtarabilir misin?"

languages.text: « J'ai cru comprendre que vous aviez déjà traité des cas de ce genre, Eogunn. Pouvez-vous sauver cet homme ? »
languages.original_text: "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"

traits.locale_text: « J'ai cru comprendre que vous aviez déjà traité des cas de ce genre, Eogunn. Pouvez-vous sauver cet homme ? »

languages.text: «Tengo entendido que tiene experiencia con casos similares, ¿no, Eogunn? ¿Puede salvar a este hombre?».
languages.original_text: "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"

traits.locale_text: «Tengo entendido que tiene experiencia con casos similares, ¿no, Eogunn? ¿Puede salvar a este hombre?».

languages.text: "Es heißt, Ihr habt Erfahrung mit derartigen Fällen, Eogunn? Könnt Ihr diesen Mann retten?"
languages.original_text: "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"

traits.locale_text: "Es heißt, Ihr habt Erfahrung mit derartigen Fällen, Eogunn? Könnt Ihr diesen Mann retten?"

languages.text: "エオグン、あなたはこのようなケースの経験があるそうですね？この男を救えるか？"
languages.original_text: "I understand you have experience in such cases, Eogunn? Can you save this man?"

traits.locale_text: "エオグン、あなたはこのようなケースの経験があるそうですね？この男を救えるか？"
